title: Keep i18next in place.
body: This app keeps the existing i18next provider and language selector, then mirrors the chosen locale into a nested 18ways surface.
selectorHelp: The selector changes i18next first. A bridge component then pushes that same locale into 18ways.
legacyParagraph: These strings still come from the repo's old i18next resources, so the existing app can stay as it is.
legacyBulletOne: Keep the current i18next dictionaries and hooks.
legacyBulletTwo: Let the old selector remain the source of truth.
legacyBulletThree: Adopt 18ways only where new UI needs it.
footerNote: Use a real 18ways API key when you are ready to replace the demo locale with production target locales.
